content:
Each = Recursive Thread, Cross-Linked & Exportable.

| THREAD NAME | PURPOSE |
|-------------------------|---------|
| ::MAP_OS_4BLOOM | Master System Map (artist IDs, logic modes, branching)
| ::SYMB0LS_GLYPH_NET | Glyph + iconography registry
| ::Qv33R_CORE | Personal + collective nonfiction, podcasting, pedagogy
| ::GR1ND3R_LOGIK | Dream logic, horror writing engine, ARG structures
| ::MET4_CORE | Myth core: narrative logic, timelines, theology
| ::ETC_AUDIO_NET | Sampling systems, audio identities, music metadata
| ::KONS0L_ARCHIV | Citation engines, index of mythology/history/philosophy
| ::BIZ_MODE_X | Product design, commercialization layers
| ::EDU_SYLLABUS_X | Pedagogy toolkit builder, modular teaching tools
| ::TRANSLAT10N_ENGINE | Wordcut processors, multilingual remapping
